name: io.github.dstrupl/vardoger
title: vardoger
description: Personalize AI coding assistants by analyzing local conversation history. Runs entirely on your machine.

environmentVariables.name: VARDOGER_MCP_PLATFORM
environmentVariables.description: Override the host platform identifier (cursor, claude-code, codex, copilot, windsurf, cline, openclaw). When unset, vardoger uses the calling host's defaults.
